variable.name: Waulter - Analytics & Optimization Allowed
variable.notes: Category 5 — Website Improvement & Optimization. True if ANY analytics purpose is accepted. Includes: PU045 Individual behavior analysis, PU046 Aggregate web analytics (GA4), PU047 Traffic source analysis, PU048 System/device analysis, PU050 A/B testing, PU051 Conversion tracking, PU052 Payment process analysis. googleCategory: analytics_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - Marketing Allowed
variable.notes: Category 7 — Marketing. True if ANY marketing purpose is accepted. Includes: PU055 Social media interaction, PU057 Behavior tracking, PU058 Display ads, PU059 Personalized ads, PU061 Ad campaign measurement, PU063 Offer optimization, PU064 Social monitoring, PU065 Phone marketing, PU066 Affiliate, PU067 Cross-site tracking, PU071 External ads, PU072 Retargeting data, PU073 Remarketing, PU074 Email marketing. googleCategory: ad_storage, ad_personalization.

variable.name: Waulter - Advanced Tracking Allowed
variable.notes: Category 6 — Other (Advanced Individual Tracking). True if PU054 (heatmaps, session recordings) is accepted. googleCategory: functionality_storage, analytics_storage, security_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - Functionality Allowed
variable.notes: Categories 2+4 — Website Functionality + Website Monitoring. True if ANY functional/monitoring purpose is accepted. Covers chat widgets, language preferences, accessibility, session monitoring, error tracking, etc. googleCategory: functionality_storage, security_storage, personalization_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU046 Web Analytics
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU046 — Aggregate web analytics (e.g., GA4 page views, audience reports). googleCategory: analytics_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU050 AB Testing
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU050 — A/B testing and experimentation (e.g., Google Optimize, VWO). googleCategory: analytics_storage, functionality_storage, personalization_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU051 Conversion Tracking
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU051 — Conversion tracking and measurement. googleCategory: analytics_storage, ad_user_data, web_analytics, sledovani_konverzi.

variable.name: Waulter - PU054 Heatmaps & Recordings
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU054 — Heatmaps and session recordings (e.g., Hotjar, Smartlook). googleCategory: functionality_storage, analytics_storage, security_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU061 Ad Campaign Measurement
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU061 — Ad campaign performance measurement (Marketing category, NOT analytics). googleCategory: ad_storage, ad_personalization, analytics_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU072 Retargeting
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU072 — Data sharing for retargeting (e.g., Facebook Custom Audiences). googleCategory: ad_personalization, ad_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU073 Remarketing
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU073 — Remarketing and retargeting ads (e.g., Google Ads remarketing lists). googleCategory: ad_personalization, ad_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - PU074 Email Marketing
variable.notes: Purpose-level: PU074 — Email marketing tracking. googleCategory: ad_storage.

trigger.name: Waulter - All Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Core: fires when user grants ALL consent (decision contains 'allow').

trigger.name: Waulter - All Consent Exception
trigger.notes: Core: blocks tags when full consent ('allow') has NOT been given. Fires on init + decision change.

trigger.name: Waulter - Decision Changed
trigger.notes: Core: fires on page init and consent change. Filters out events where no decision exists yet.

trigger.name: Waulter - Analytics Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Category 5: fires analytics/optimization tags when ANY analytics purpose is accepted (PU045-PU052).

trigger.name: Waulter - Analytics Exception
trigger.notes: Category 5: blocks analytics tags when NO analytics/optimization purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Category 7: fires marketing tags when ANY marketing purpose is accepted (PU055-PU074).

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Exception
trigger.notes: Category 7: blocks marketing tags when NO marketing purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Advanced Tracking Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Category 6: fires advanced tracking tags when PU054 (heatmaps, session recordings) is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Advanced Tracking Exception
trigger.notes: Category 6: blocks heatmap/recording tags when PU054 is not accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Functionality Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Categories 2+4: fires functional tags when ANY functionality/monitoring purpose is accepted (chat widgets, preferences, error tracking, etc.).

trigger.name: Waulter - Functionality Exception
trigger.notes: Categories 2+4: blocks functional tags when NO functionality/monitoring purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - AB Testing Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Purpose-level: fires A/B testing tags when PU050 is specifically accepted. Finer control than Analytics category trigger.

trigger.name: Waulter - AB Testing Exception
trigger.notes: Purpose-level: blocks A/B testing tags when PU050 is not accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Services Exception v1
trigger.notes: Backward compat: EQUALS-based marketing exception. Functionally same as Marketing Exception but kept for existing container migrations.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Services Exception v2
trigger.notes: Backward compat: REGEX-based marketing exception. Functionally same as Marketing Exception but kept for existing container migrations.

trigger.name: Waulter - No Consent (Block GA4)
trigger.notes: Composite trigger group. After import, manually add child triggers: Analytics Exception + Marketing Exception. Used as a single blocking trigger on GA4 config tags.
